title: WestRock Company (WRK) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value analysis of WestRock Company (WRK) indicating its 2024 merger to form Smurfit Westrock.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate
fcfGrowth.rationale: WestRock Company (WRK) successfully merged with Smurfit Kappa in 2024 to become Smurfit Westrock. As WRK is no longer a standalone, publicly traded company, reliable forward-looking Free Cash Flow estimates and a DCF model cannot be calculated for the legacy entity.
